recmod.tooltip.locked: Use your flash to learn more about this item.
recmod.tooltip.known: Press G to open the log.
recmod.codex.battery.desc: An ordinary battery, the kind you used to buy anywhere. It recharges the camera and, along with it, whatever is left of you. Swapping a battery is the only known way to recover sanity.
recmod.codex.battery.obtain: Found in the chests of old structures and lying on the ground near you. It can also be built from 4 aluminum ingots, 2 gold ingots, glowstone dust and redstone.
recmod.codex.aluminum.desc: Light, soft and dull. It is good for exactly one thing: becoming the shell of a battery. Whoever finds an aluminum vein in a cave is a few steps away from never rationing power again.
recmod.codex.aluminum.obtain: Small veins in any overworld cave, between height -32 and 60. A stone pickaxe is enough. Smelt the raw ore into ingots.
